name: Notifier Manager
description: .NET Fw 4.8 + EF6 + LocalDB bildirim yönetim uygulaması

steps.run: if not exist "NotifierManager.WinForms\bin\Release\NotifierManager.WinForms.exe" ( echo [X] Build edilmemis - once 'Build' calistirin & exit /b 1 )

steps.label: NotifierManager (tray)
steps.run: NotifierManager.WinForms\bin\Release\NotifierManager.WinForms.exe
taskkill /IM NotifierManager.WinForms.exe /F /T
taskkill /IM NotifierManager.WinForms.exe /F /T

steps.label: NotifierManager (tray)
steps.run: NotifierManager.WinForms\bin\Release\NotifierManager.WinForms.exe

for /f "usebackq tokens=*" %i in (`"%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe`) do "%i" NotifierManager.WinForms.sln /p:Configuration=Release /v:minimal /nologo

for /f "usebackq tokens=*" %i in (`"%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe`) do "%i" NotifierManager.WinForms.sln /p:Configuration=Debug /v:minimal /nologo

for /f "usebackq tokens=*" %i in (`"%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe`) do "%i" NotifierManager.WinForms.sln /t:Restore /v:minimal /nologo

powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Get-Command sqllocaldb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { sqllocaldb start MSSQLLocalDB } else { Write-Host '[!] sqllocaldb yok - SQL Server Express LocalDB kurun' }"

for /f "usebackq tokens=*" %i in (`"%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe`) do "%i" NotifierManager.WinForms.sln /p:Configuration=Release /v:minimal /nologo

for /f "usebackq tokens=*" %i in (`"%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe`) do "%i" NotifierManager.WinForms.sln /t:Restore /v:minimal /nologo
if exist "%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" (echo [OK] vswhere bulundu) else (echo [X] vswhere yok - Visual Studio veya Build Tools gerekli)

for /f "usebackq tokens=*" %i in (`"%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe`) do echo [OK] msbuild: %i

powershell -NoProfile -Command "$v = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\NET Framework Setup\NDP\v4\Full' -Name Release -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Release; if ($v -ge 528040) { Write-Host '[OK] .NET Fw 4.8 kurulu (release='$v')' } else { Write-Host '[X] .NET Fw 4.8 yok' }"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Get-Command sqllocaldb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host '[OK] LocalDB kuruldu'; sqllocaldb info } else { Write-Host '[X] LocalDB yok - SQL Server Express LocalDB kurun: winget install Microsoft.SQLServer.2022.LocalDB' }"
sqllocaldb start MSSQLLocalDB
sqllocaldb info MSSQLLocalDB
sqllocaldb info MSSQLLocalDB
echo Baglanmak icin: sqlcmd -S "(localdb)\MSSQLLocalDB"
tasklist /FI "IMAGENAME eq NotifierManager.WinForms.exe" /NH
sqllocaldb info MSSQLLocalDB
if exist "NotifierManager.WinForms\bin\Release" ( explorer "NotifierManager.WinForms\bin\Release" ) else ( echo [X] Once build alin )
